name: ClawGuard
description: Minimal ClawGuard approval spike for OpenClaw.

approvalTtlSeconds.label: Approval TTL (seconds)
approvalTtlSeconds.help: How long an allow-once retry remains valid after approval.

pendingActionLimit.label: Pending action capacity
pendingActionLimit.help: Maximum number of live pending actions to keep before evicting the oldest entry.

allowOnceGrantLimit.label: Allow-once grant capacity
allowOnceGrantLimit.help: Maximum number of live allow-once grants to keep before evicting the oldest entry.
